title: campanula antiqua
intro: Campanula antiqua, also known as the ancient bellflower, is a perennial plant species in the bellflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Campanula antiqua include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Campanula antiqua can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
